name: RCB OE TS.Z./Henkel Vz
summary: Henkel AG & Co. KGaA, headquartered in Düsseldorf, Germany, operates in the consumer and industrial sectors. The company is known for its brands in adhesives technologies, beauty care, and laundry & home care. Henkel's product portfolio includes brands like Loctite, Schwarzkopf, and Persil.
